title: Assembly Bill 125 will place the Equitable Economic Recovery, Healthy Food Access, Climate Resilient Farms and Worker Protection Bond Act before the voters in 2022

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 125 aims to accelerate California's economic recovery and improve climate resilience while enhancing healthy food access.",
    "The coronavirus pandemic has revealed vulnerabilities and inequalities in California's food supply and infrastructure.",
    "AB 125 is intended to spur economic recovery and rebuild California’s food and farming systems to be more equitable.",
    "The bond proposed in AB 125 will invest $3.122 billion over five years in various areas related to food and agriculture.",
    "AB 125 is designed to provide resources for farmers to cut climate pollution and maintain sustainable agriculture in California.",
    "The bond includes allocations for regional and local food processing, distribution, and market infrastructure for vulnerable communities.",
    "AB 125 aims to improve the safety and well-being of farm and food system workers.",
    "One of the goals of AB 125 is to combat hunger and improve access to healthy food.",
    "AB 125 promotes sustainable agriculture practices to enhance climate resilience.",
    "The legislation allocates $175 million for the Healthy Soils Program to increase carbon capture and reduce greenhouse gas emissions.",
    "AB 125 includes $100 million for water use efficiency projects on farms to protect surface and groundwater.",
    "$122.5 million is earmarked for the California Farmland Conservancy Program to enhance agricultural lands and improve climate resilience.",
    "$450 million is designated for grants to develop family housing for farmworkers.",
    "The bond allocates $750 million to expand healthy food access and combat hunger.",
    "AB 125 includes $200 million for grants focusing on compost infrastructure and food recovery projects.",
    "The bond represents the largest investment in sustainable and organic agriculture in California's history.",
    "AB 125 aims to support the transition to organic farming by strengthening supply chains and investing in technical assistance.",
    "The bill addresses the need for a resilient and equitable food system in California amidst challenges such as climate change and economic stagnation."
  ]
}
```
